---
title: "first"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-28"
---

Load a dataset
```{r}
setwd("D:/Training/Academy/R Course (C-DAC)/Datasets")
cars93 <- read.csv("Cars93.csv")
head(cars93)
```
Freqency count of Type of cars
```{r}
table(cars93$Type)
```
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
mean_price <- cars93 %>% 
                group_by(Type) %>% 
                summarise(mu_price=mean(Price))

ggplot(data = mean_price, 
       aes(x=Type,y=mu_price, fill=Type))+
  geom_bar(stat = 'identity')+
  labs(y="Mean Price", x="Car Type")
```
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv("D:/Training/Academy/R Course (C-DAC)/Datasets/Cars93.csv")
df.columns
```

```{python}
plt.scatter(df['MPG.city'], df['Price'])
plt.show()
```

```{python}
d = [78, 45, 34]
print(d[0])
```

```{python}
s = {'a':23, 'b':56}
print(s['b'])
```
